fillEmailPassword: Please enter your email and password.

reset.title: Reset password
reset.subtitle: We'll send you a link to reset your password
reset.sentBody: If <0>{{email}}</0> is registered with us, a password-reset link will be sent.

update.pwTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters.
update.pwTooCommon: This password is too common — please choose a less guessable one.
update.title: Choose a new password
update.subtitle: Enter a new password for your account
update.doneBody: You can continue to the app with your new password.

signupScreen.passwordMin8: Password must be at least 8 characters.
signupScreen.passwordTooCommon: This password is too common — please choose a less guessable one.
signupScreen.mustAccept: Please accept the Privacy Policy, Data Processing Agreement, and Terms of Use.
signupScreen.sentBody: We sent a confirmation link to {{email}}. Once confirmed, you can log in.
signupScreen.consentPolicies: I have read and agree to the <a1>Privacy Policy</a1> and the <a2>Data Processing Agreement</a2>
signupScreen.consentTerms: I have read and agree to the <a1>Terms of Use</a1>
signupScreen.consentMarketing: I agree that Simplicity may use my email to build advertising audiences (revocable at any time)

errors.alreadyRegistered: This email is already registered. You can log in.
errors.passwordTooShort: Password is too short — at least 8 characters.
errors.emailNotConfirmed: Please confirm your email before logging in.
errors.rateLimit: Too many attempts — please try again in a moment.
errors.providerDisabled: Google sign-in isn't set up for this project yet.
errors.googlePlayServices: Google Play services are unavailable or out of date.
errors.samePassword: Your new password must be different from the old one.
errors.sessionExpired: The link has expired. Please request a new reset link.
errors.generic: Something went wrong — please try again.
